title: rhododendron racemosum
intro: Rhododendron racemosum, also known as the eastern rhododendron or rhododendron racemosum, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron racemosum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
